creator: rigoletto@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 192536
Update to v1.11.1.

Attached a patch to update to version 1.11.1.

There port build fine but there are some warnings I can't fix nor I know if they are relevant:

>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>
configure: WARNING: sys/conf.h: present but cannot be compiled
configure: WARNING: sys/conf.h:     check for missing prerequisite headers?
configure: WARNING: sys/conf.h: see the Autoconf documentation
configure: WARNING: sys/conf.h:     section "Present But Cannot Be Compiled"
configure: WARNING: sys/conf.h: proceeding with the compiler's result
<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<

Thanks!
